code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut negative = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digit = true
      else if b == 45 and not has_digit
        negative = true
      else
        if has_digit
          if negative
            result = list.push(result, -current)
          else
            result = list.push(result, current)
          end
          current = 0
          has_digit = false
          negative = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    if negative
      result = list.push(result, -current)
    else
      result = list.push(result, current)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn run() -> Option<Unit>
  let line1 = io.read_line()?
  let line2 = io.read_line()?
  let xs = parse_ints(line1)
  let ys = parse_ints(line2)
  let n = list.len(xs)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let x = list.get(xs, i)?
    let y = list.get(ys, i)?
    let s = x + y
    println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
    i = i + 1
  end
  Some(())
end

run()
